strategy.name: CleanPep evidence-first partnership pipeline
strategy.goal: Prioritize vendors and labs that can either earn affiliate revenue or help build a defensible full-panel COA database.
rules: Affiliate status must never change ranking.
Prioritize vendors with batch-specific COAs, public contact paths, and willingness to provide deeper panels.
Ask for code plus link. Links monetize CleanPep buttons; codes spread through coupon extensions and social posts.
Treat standard purity/identity-only COAs as incomplete until residual solvents, TFA/counterion, endotoxin, content/fill, and identity evidence are verified.

targets.name: Peptidology
targets.affiliate_path: No public affiliate form found. Use direct partnership outreach.
evidence_signals: Public COA PDFs found for BPC-157 and Retatrutide.
Observed examples include assay/content, HPLC purity, endotoxin, and sterility evidence across checked PDFs.
known_gaps: Residual solvents and TFA/counterion were not confirmed in the checked PDFs.
Need permission or feed for batch-level COA ingestion.
ask: Affiliate link and dedicated CleanPep code.
Whether they have residual solvent and TFA/counterion testing for GLP products.
Whether they will sponsor expanded-panel testing through a named third-party lab.
targets.why_it_matters: Best current target for the CleanPep angle: real public documents and a visible testing story, but still room to push for solvents/TFA.

targets.name: Limitless Life Nootropics / Limitless Biotech
evidence_signals: Public affiliate page claims 15% commission on most peptides and 12% on VIP/GLP peptides.
Affiliate page says referrals get a 15% promotional code.
Affiliate page claims products are third-party verified by three labs.
known_gaps: Need actual batch-level COA depth, not just marketing language.
Need confirmation of residual solvents, TFA/counterion, endotoxin, content/fill, and identity testing.
ask: Affiliate approval, CleanPep code, and tracking link.
Current GLP product COA examples before promoting.
Clarify which labs and which panels are routine versus optional.
targets.why_it_matters: Likely strongest near-term money target because the program is real, pays stated commissions, and includes a public promo-code angle.

targets.name: Prime Peptide Solutions
evidence_signals: Affiliate page says approved affiliates get a custom referral code and link.
Product pages advertise COA verified, HPLC, and MS testing.
Retatrutide page lists public batch COA links and purity values.
known_gaps: Routine residual solvents, TFA/counterion, endotoxin, content/fill, and sterility were not confirmed as standard for every batch.
Requires customer account before affiliate application.
targets.why_it_matters: Good code/link mechanics, but quality claims need CleanPep verification before aggressive promotion.

targets.name: Peptides Source
evidence_signals: Educational COA content discusses HPLC, MS, and possible moisture/residual solvent testing.
known_gaps: Affiliate page is easy, but public evidence depth looks weaker than Peptidology/Limitless/Prime.
Need actual batch COAs before promoting.
ask: Sample batch COAs for GLP products.
targets.why_it_matters: Potential revenue target, but do not let easy approval pull CleanPep toward weak proof.

targets.name: Peptide Sciences
evidence_signals: The current site says Peptide Sciences voluntarily shut down operations and discontinued sales.
known_gaps: Any successor/affiliate-looking site using the name should be treated as unauthorized until proven otherwise.
targets.why_it_matters: Avoids wasting time and protects CleanPep from pointing users at brand-confusion scams.

targets.name: SteriGenix Analytical
evidence_signals: Publishes peptide testing services for HPLC purity, mass spectrometry, bacterial endotoxin, and residual solvent testing.
Lists USP/ICH method references including USP <85>, USP <467>, and ICH Q3C.
known_gaps: Need pricing, sample size, chain-of-custody, and public verification workflow.
ask: Quote for a CleanPep full panel: identity, purity, content/fill, residual solvents, TFA/counterion, endotoxin, sterility/bioburden, water content.
Whether reports can be public/verifiable by batch ID.
Volume pricing for blind vendor audits.
targets.why_it_matters: This is the route toward your own actual differentiated vendor: full-panel proof instead of affiliate fog.

targets.name: ACS Peptide Testing Labs
evidence_signals: Publishes peptide testing services including HPLC purity, mass spectrometry, ICP-MS heavy metals, GC-MS residual solvent analysis, and endotoxin testing.
known_gaps: Need pricing confirmation and exact report format.
ask: Quote for the same CleanPep full panel.
Rush pricing and sample quantity requirements.
targets.why_it_matters: Second lab quote gives negotiating leverage and a backup for CleanPep-funded verification.

next_actions: Apply to Limitless because commission/code mechanics are explicit.
Create/apply to Prime Peptide Solutions because it can issue both code and link.
Email Peptidology with a partnership ask centered on expanded panels and CleanPep visibility.
Request lab-panel quotes from SteriGenix and ACS before spending money on your own inventory.
Do not pursue Peptide Sciences, Pure Tested's broken affiliate flow, or Paramount's suspect partner-domain path until they clarify.
